title: Fused GMPO (Geo-Mean) policy loss Triton kernel
summary: Single-pass sequence-level Triton kernel for GMPO policy loss accumulation and clipping metrics.
success_gate: Preserve GMPO sequence semantics while reducing full-pass runtime on representative PPO shapes.

results.note: Single-pass Triton kernel per sequence: accumulates neg_kl_min_sum, adv_sum, mask_sum, clip counts in one scan. Computes ratio=exp(neg_kl_min_sum/mask_sum) then loss=-adv_mean*ratio. Same GSPO pattern (FIPO-029).

notes: Normalized from the legacy task-card schema on 2026-04-03 to restore queue validation.
